creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
Since MD5 are being removed from ports distinfo, portsclean delete still referenced distfiles when run with -D option.

The problem has been reported twice in the ruby ml, here:
(with patch) http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ruby/2010-October/000704.html
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ruby/2010-October/000706.html

How-To-Repeat: run portsclean -D
say goodbye to some valid distfiles
